data.content: Refreshed all 8 README screenshots in docs/screenshots from http://localhost:3210/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery using Playwright MCP/headless browser capture. Replaced queues, active, human-action, retakes, history, hot-keys, dispatch-simple, and dispatch-advanced; verified bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build in the isolated worktree. Pushed commit 9042006fa6b1 to origin/main.
